title: T-010 — Drizzle migration: d365_push_dlq table + RLS
prompt:
# T-010 — Drizzle migration: d365_push_dlq

PRD: docs/prd/08-PRODUCTION-PRD.md §9.11, §12.6, §16.4 V-PROD-13

## Goal
Create d365_push_dlq per §9.11 with idx_dlq_open partial WHERE resolved_at IS NULL (V-PROD-13 open/closed split), org-scoped RLS via the foundation `app.current_org_id()` function.

## Implementation contract
packages/db/schema/production/d365-push-dlq.ts: PK id UUID, `org_id uuid NOT NULL`, source_outbox_event_id BIGINT REFERENCES production_outbox_events(id), event_type text NOT NULL, payload JSONB NOT NULL, last_error text, attempt_count INTEGER NOT NULL, moved_to_dlq_at default now, resolved_at, resolved_by, resolution_notes text. Index idx_dlq_open partial WHERE resolved_at IS NULL. ENABLE+FORCE ROW LEVEL SECURITY + policy `d365_push_dlq_org_context` USING (`org_id = app.current_org_id()`) WITH CHECK (`org_id = app.current_org_id()`) — the foundation function from `packages/db/migrations/002-rls-baseline.sql`; never `current_setting('app.tenant_id')` or `current_setting('app.current_org_id')` GUC.

## Files (scope)
- packages/db/schema/production/d365-push-dlq.ts [create]
- packages/db/schema/production/index.ts [modify]
- packages/db/migrations/NNNN_d365_push_dlq.sql [create]
- packages/db/__tests__/d365-push-dlq-schema.test.ts [create]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given migration applied, when pg_indexes queried, then idx_dlq_open partial WHERE resolved_at IS NULL exists (V-PROD-13)
2. Given INSERT with source_outbox_event_id pointing to non-existent row, when run, then FK violation raised
3. Given migration applied and no `app.set_org_context(...)` has been called (so `app.current_org_id()` returns NULL), when SELECT * FROM d365_push_dlq runs as `app_user`, then RLS returns zero rows (fail-closed)
4. Given pg_policies is inspected, when the d365_push_dlq policy is listed, then qual/withcheck reference `app.current_org_id()` and contain no `current_setting('app.tenant_id'|'app.current_org_id')` GUC

## Test strategy
- RED: schema test asserting partial index + FK + RLS via app.set_org_context as app_user before schema exists
- Run 'pnpm --filter db drizzle:generate && pnpm --filter db test d365-push-dlq-schema'

## Risk red lines
- Do not read `current_setting('app.tenant_id')` or `current_setting('app.current_org_id')` directly — use the foundation `app.current_org_id()` function so the NULL-safe setter contract is preserved.
- Do not use `tenant_id` as the business-scope column; per Wave0 v4.3 lock it is `org_id`.
- Do not skip RLS / FORCE ROW LEVEL SECURITY (cross-org DLQ leak)
- Do not break partial index predicate (impacts query plan)
- Do not weaken FK to outbox

pipeline_inputs.description: d365_push_dlq table (org_id-scoped) with FK to outbox, partial open-row index, foundation app.current_org_id() RLS.
pipeline_inputs.details: Per §9.11 SQL. `org_id uuid NOT NULL` per Wave0 v4.3. FK to production_outbox_events(id). idx_dlq_open partial WHERE resolved_at IS NULL. ENABLE+FORCE ROW LEVEL SECURITY with policy `d365_push_dlq_org_context` USING/WITH CHECK `org_id = app.current_org_id()`. RLS uses foundation `app.current_org_id()` function (Wave0 decision; see `_meta/audits/2026-05-14-architecture-and-cross-cutting-gaps.md` §Tenant-context).
out_of_scope: Do not implement DLQ replay UI
Do not implement DLQ admin endpoints

Given pg_policies is inspected, when the d365_push_dlq policy is listed, then qual/withcheck reference app.current_org_id() and contain no current_setting('app.tenant_id'|'app.current_org_id') GUC
